wafv2.rulegroup.notstatement.CfnAbout: A logical rule statement used to negate the results of another rule statement. You provide one [Statement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-wafv2-rulegroup-notstatement.html

wafv2.rulegroup.notstatement.Statement.Description: The statement to negate. You can use any statement that can be nested.
